title: Ontario Welcomes Siemensâ€™ $150 Million Investment to Establish New Technology Centre in Oakville
content: Ontario is welcoming a $150 million investment from Siemens to establish a Global AI Manufacturing Technologies R&D Center in Oakville, focused on advancing electric vehicle (EV) battery production. The center will develop AI-driven technologies to enhance battery efficiency, production processes, and recycling, supporting Ontarioâ€™s growing EV supply chain. This investment will create up to 90 high-quality jobs and is backed by $7.2 million from the provinceâ€™s Invest Ontario Fund. Announced during Ontarioâ€™s trade mission to Germany, the initiative strengthens the provinceâ€™s role in the global EV sector, building on over $46 billion in auto investments since 2020.
author: Analysts Account
